Class Refactor

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.ToolContext
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.AnahataToolkit
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.ide.Refactor
All Implemented Interfaces:
ContextProvider, PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class Refactor extends AnahataToolkit
A toolkit for performing programmatic refactoring operations within the NetBeans IDE.

This toolkit leverages the NetBeans Refactoring API to ensure that changes are propagated correctly across the entire project (e.g., updating imports, references, and string constants). It supports a wide range of standard Java refactorings such as rename, move, copy, inline, and interface extraction.

Author:
anahata

      public Refactor()

  • Method Details

    • getSystemInstructions

      public List<String> getSystemInstructions() throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: ContextProvider
      Gets a list of system instruction strings provided by this context provider. These are typically prepended to the conversation as high-level guidance.
      Returns:
      A list of system instruction strings.
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during instruction generation.

    • rename

      public String rename(String filePath, String newName) throws Exception
      Performs a programmatic rename refactoring of a file or class within the IDE.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the file to rename.
      newName - The new name for the file or class (without the extension).
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if there is an error invoking the operation.

    • renameMember

      public String renameMember(String filePath, String memberFqn, String newName) throws Exception
      Renames a class member (method or field) across all open projects.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file.
      memberFqn - The ABSOLUTE FQN of the member.
      newName - The new name for the member.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if there is an error invoking the operation.

    • moveClass

      public String moveClass(String sourcePath, String targetPath) throws Exception
      Moves a Java class to a new package or integrates it into another class.

      For package moves, use a folder path as target. For member integration, use the path of the target .java file.

      Parameters:
      sourcePath - The absolute path of the .java file to move.
      targetPath - The absolute path of the destination folder or .java file.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • moveFile

      public String moveFile(String sourcePath, String targetFolderPath) throws Exception
      Moves a non-Java file to a different folder.
      Parameters:
      sourcePath - The absolute path of the file to move.
      targetFolderPath - The absolute path of the target folder.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • copyClass

      public String copyClass(String sourcePath, String targetFolderPath) throws Exception
      Copies a Java class to a new package or folder.
      Parameters:
      sourcePath - The absolute path of the .java file to copy.
      targetFolderPath - The absolute path of the destination folder.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • copyFile

      public String copyFile(String sourcePath, String targetFolderPath) throws Exception
      Copies a non-Java file to a different folder.
      Parameters:
      sourcePath - The absolute path of the file to copy.
      targetFolderPath - The absolute path of the target folder.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • safeDelete

      public String safeDelete(String filePath, boolean checkInComments) throws Exception
      Performs a programmatic safe delete refactoring of a file or class.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the file to delete.
      checkInComments - Whether to search for usages in comments and strings.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if there is an error invoking the operation.

    • inline

      public String inline(String filePath, String memberFqn, org.netbeans.modules.refactoring.java.api.InlineRefactoring.Type type) throws Exception
      Inlines a method, constant, or variable.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file.
      memberFqn - The FQN of the member to inline.
      type - The type of inlining to perform (METHOD, TEMP, CONSTANT).
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • encapsulateField

      public String encapsulateField(String filePath, String fieldFqn, String getterName, String setterName) throws Exception
      Encapsulates a field by creating a getter and setter and updating all usages.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file.
      fieldFqn - The ABSOLUTE FQN of the field to encapsulate.
      getterName - The name for the getter method (optional, will be generated if null).
      setterName - The name for the setter method (optional, will be generated if null).
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • invertBoolean

      public String invertBoolean(String filePath, String memberFqn, String newName) throws Exception
      Inverts a boolean method or variable.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file.
      memberFqn - The ABSOLUTE FQN of the boolean member to invert.
      newName - The new name for the inverted member.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • extractInterface

      public String extractInterface(String filePath, String interfaceName, List<String> memberFqns) throws Exception
      Extracts an interface from a class.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file containing the class.
      interfaceName - The name of the new interface.
      memberFqns - The ABSOLUTE FQNs of the members to extract. in the interface.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • pullUp

      public String pullUp(String filePath, String targetClassFqn, List<String> memberFqns) throws Exception
      Pulls up members to a superclass.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file containing the subclass.
      targetClassFqn - The fully qualified name of the target superclass.
      memberFqns - The ABSOLUTE FQNs of the members to pull up.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • pushDown

      public String pushDown(String filePath, List<String> memberFqns) throws Exception
      Pushes down members to subclasses.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file containing the superclass.
      memberFqns - The ABSOLUTE FQNs of the members to push down.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • changeMethodSignature

      public String changeMethodSignature(String filePath, String memberFqn, String newName, String newReturnType, List<Refactor.ParameterChange> parameterChanges) throws Exception
      Changes the signature of a method, including its name, return type, and parameters.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file.
      memberFqn - The ABSOLUTE FQN of the method.
      newName - The new name for the method.
      newReturnType - The new return type (FQN or simple name).
      parameterChanges - The new parameter configuration.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • extractSuperclass

      public String extractSuperclass(String filePath, String superclassName, List<String> memberFqns) throws Exception
      Extracts a superclass from an existing class.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file.
      superclassName - The name for the new superclass.
      memberFqns - The ABSOLUTE FQNs of the members to extract.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • useSupertype

      public String useSupertype(String filePath, String supertypeFqn) throws Exception
      Replaces usages of a class with a supertype where possible.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file.
      supertypeFqn - The FQN of the supertype to use.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • moveInnerToTopLevel

      public String moveInnerToTopLevel(String filePath, String memberFqn) throws Exception
      Moves a nested/inner class to the top level.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file containing the inner class.
      memberFqn - The ABSOLUTE FQN of the inner class to move.
      Returns:
      A detailed log of the refactoring process.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the operation fails.

    • whereUsed

      public String whereUsed(String filePath, boolean searchInComments) throws Exception
      Finds all usages of a file or class within all open projects.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the file to search for.
      searchInComments - Whether to search for usages in comments and strings.
      Returns:
      A formatted list of all found usages.
      Throws:
      Exception - if there is an error invoking the query.

    • whereUsedMember

      public String whereUsedMember(String filePath, String memberFqn, boolean searchInComments) throws Exception
      Finds all usages of a specific member (field or method) within a Java file.
      Parameters:
      filePath - The absolute path of the Java file.
      memberFqn - The ABSOLUTE FQN of the member to search for.
      searchInComments - Whether to search for usages in comments and strings.
      Returns:
      A formatted list of all found usages.
      Throws:
      Exception - if there is an error invoking the query.

    • executeRefactoring

      private String executeRefactoring(org.netbeans.modules.refactoring.api.AbstractRefactoring refactoring, String sessionName)
      Helper method to execute a refactoring operation through its standard lifecycle.

      Performs pre-checks, parameter validation, session preparation, and finally executes the refactoring while collecting elements and status reports.

      Parameters:
      refactoring - The refactoring operation to execute.
      sessionName - The name for the refactoring session.
      Returns:
      A detailed feedback string.

    • enrichWithContextInfo

      private String enrichWithContextInfo(String path, String result, String action)
      Enriches the tool output with information about managed resources affected by the refactoring.

      It provides specific instructions on how to purge or recover deleted resource content based on whether the action was a deletion or a move.

      Parameters:
      path - The path of the resource.
      result - The raw refactoring result.
      action - The type of refactoring action performed (e.g., 'deleted', 'moved').
      Returns:
      An enriched result string.

    • getLookupForFile

      private org.openide.util.Lookup getLookupForFile(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo)
      Helper method to create a Lookup for a file, prioritizing high-precision Java elements.

      CRITICAL FIX: For Java files, this method now returns ONLY the TreePathHandle. Including the FileObject alongside the handle causes a conflict between the generic file-move plugin and the specialized Java plugin, leading to atomicity failures and 'stale FileObject' crashes during the commit phase.

      Parameters:
      fo - The FileObject.
      Returns:
      A Lookup containing the optimal identifiers for the refactoring engine.

    • resolveMembers

      private static void resolveMembers(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, List<String> memberFqns, List<org.netbeans.api.java.source.ElementHandle<ExecutableElement>> methods, List<org.netbeans.api.java.source.ElementHandle<VariableElement>> fields) throws IOException
      Resolves a set of member names into ElementHandles.
      Parameters:
      fo - The FileObject.
      memberFqns - The FQNs to resolve.
      methods - Output list for resolved methods.
      fields - Output list for resolved fields.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the source cannot be parsed.

    • resolveMemberInfos

      private static void resolveMemberInfos(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, List<String> memberFqns, List<org.netbeans.modules.refactoring.java.api.MemberInfo<org.netbeans.api.java.source.ElementHandle<? extends Element>>> members) throws IOException
      Resolves member names into MemberInfo objects for refactoring.
      Parameters:
      fo - The FileObject.
      memberFqns - the fqns of the members to resolve
      members - Output list for MemberInfo objects.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the source cannot be parsed.

    • resolveMember

      private static org.netbeans.api.java.source.TreePathHandle resolveMember(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo, String memberFqn) throws Exception
      Authoritatively resolves a member FQN to a TreePathHandle, throwing a detailed exception with candidates if not found.
      Parameters:
      fo - The file object.
      memberFqn - The member FQN.
      Returns:
      The handle.
      Throws:
      Exception - if not found or parsing fails.

    • getTreePathHandleForClass

      public static org.netbeans.api.java.source.TreePathHandle getTreePathHandleForClass(org.openide.filesystems.FileObject fo) throws IOException
      Creates a TreePathHandle for the primary top-level class in a file.
      Parameters:
      fo - The FileObject.
      Returns:
      A TreePathHandle for the class or null.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the source cannot be parsed.
